Ms. Robello stated that she received a letter from the insurance company and that they were unable to obtain a life insurance policy for Mr. Thomas due to the medications he is currently taking. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for and with Debra Dolch (Successor Trustee).

The Court questioned whether notice was given to or waived by Janette Yount. Ms. Robello stated that a waiver of notice was filed yesterday and that the special needs trust was not a beneficiary of this estate. The Court approved the accounting, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Jacqueline Chan, CSR#10276. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
